SQLLite.SQL: SELECT COE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "EventId" ,COE.EVENT_DATE AS "EventDate" ,COE.SERVICE_DATE AS "ServiceDate" ,'true' AS "RecordedAgainstCo" ,( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM CO_EVENTS COE1 WHERE ( COE1.EVENT_DATE > COE.EVENT_DATE OR COE1.EVENT_DATE = COE.EVENT_DATE) AND COE1.CO_NUMBER = COE.CO_NUMBER AND COE1.STD_EVENT_ID IN ('858', '859', '878', '879') AND COE1.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' ) AS "ResponseFiled" FROM CO_EVENTS COE WHERE COE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND COE.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND (COE.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' OR COE.ERROR_INDICATOR is NULL)
